title: Wu Yu
content:
Wu Yu
 was the Ancestor of the 
Corpse Sect
 in 
Planet Suzaku
's 
Country of Zhao
.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book Two

3

Links and References

Background
[
]

According to himself at least, 300 years ago he came to the 
Forest Ruins
 to use the Yin Qi there as a means of breaking through to the middle stages of Nascent Soul, however, his Corpse Puppet, who he calls 
Amu
, rebelled and escaped his control. 

100 years later his injuries healed and he went to retrieve 
Amu
, only to find the Corpse Puppet had reached the Middle stages of 
Nascent Soul
 and was too strong. He abandoned his body and hid his Nascent Soul inside the statue at the heart of the ruin. There he found 
Adai
, sleeping, and tried to possess his body. While this attempt failed, it did cause 
Adai
 to think they were connected.

History
[
]

Book Two
[
]

His abandoned body turned into a Zombie which possesses a Green Core and a consciousness all its own. This Zombie was discovered by 
Wang Lin
 who used it to help bring down 
Teng Li
. Two years later, his Corpse Puppet, 
Amu
, wakes and uses the Zombie to track him down.
